title: chthamalia nummularia
intro: Chthamalia nummularia, also known as Moneywort, is a perennial herb native to South Africa, characterized by its creeping habit and small, yellow flowers. Chthamalia nummularia has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Chthamalia nummularia can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from digestive issues to skin conditions.
